recommendations.title: The Perfect Storm
recommendations.overview: In October 1991, a confluence of weather conditions combined to form a killer storm in the North Atlantic. Caught in the storm was the sword-fishing boat Andrea Gail.

recommendations.title: Adrift
recommendations.overview: Tami Oldham and Richard Sharp couldn't anticipate that they would be sailing directly into one of the most catastrophic hurricanes in recorded history. In the aftermath of the storm, Tami awakens to find Richard badly injured and their boat in ruins.

recommendations.title: Lord of the Flies
recommendations.overview: When their plane crashes, 25 schoolboys find themselves trapped on a tropical island, miles from civilization.

recommendations.title: Jupiter's Moon
recommendations.overview: A young refugee, Aryan, is shot while illegally trying to cross the Hungarian border. While tending him back to health, a doctor at a refugee camp discovers that Aryan has gained an extraordinary talent—he can levitate. Aryan is smuggled out by the d

recommendations.title: Suddenly
recommendations.overview: Ben and Laura are a passionate but volatile couple who embark on a round-the-world sailing adventure to give their relationship a new start. During their trip, they decide to explore a vast deserted island which they discover off the coast of Chile.

recommendations.title: Munna Bhai M.B.B.S.
recommendations.overview: A gangster sets out to fulfill his father's dream of becoming a doctor.

recommendations.title: XOXO
recommendations.overview: XOXO follows six strangers whose lives collide in one frenetic, dream-chasing, hopelessly romantic night.

recommendations.title: Blood and Bone
recommendations.overview: In Los Angeles, an ex-con takes the underground fighting world by storm in his quest to fulfill a promise to a dead friend.

recommendations.title: Survive
recommendations.overview: A couple celebrates their son’s birthday in the middle of the ocean on their boat. A violent storm hits and it brings up hungry creatures from the depths and they fight for their survival.

recommendations.title: Holiday
recommendations.overview: Sascha, the young and beautiful trophy girlfriend of a Danish drug lord, arrives at his holiday villa in the seaside town of Bodrum, on the Turkish Riviera, where she is welcomed into his inner circle. Under the summer sun, she lives a carefree dream
